name: Harbour
notes: Mechanically a Farm equivalent (Food output), gated behind the same water-adjacency requirement as Port — not a separate production chain. Deliberately steep growth curve vs. Farm's mild one: lower level-1 output but +60%/level compounding, so a maxed-out Harbour eventually out-produces a maxed-out Farm despite the weaker starting point. "Fishing boats" are purely visual (boat count scales with level) — no separate boat unit/entity. Requires Wood to build/upgrade, unlike Farm.
